name: variable-font-flex
title: Variable Font Flex
description: A word lands while its variable-font weight and width axes flex from hairline-condensed to black-wide with per-character stagger; font-size eases inversely so the letterforms gain mass while the box holds.
evidence: Wave M experiment M5: variable-font axis animation with optical compensation; Roboto Flex Variable pinned via @fontsource-variable/roboto-flex@5.2.8

variables.label: Text
variables.description: The word whose variable-font axes flex.

variables.label: Axis
variables.description: Which variable-font axes animate: weight, width, or both.

variables.label: Stagger
variables.description: Seconds between per-character flex starts, clamped 0 to 0.25.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Word color: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the carved word holds until the frame cuts.
